mapper.select: SELECT * FROM film_video_source WHERE film_id = #{filmId} AND is_active = true ORDER BY priority DESC, is_trailer DESC, created_at ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO film_video_source ( film_id, raw_url, provider_type, embed_url, direct_url, thumbnail_url, title, duration_seconds, is_trailer, is_active, priority, created_at ) VALUES ( #{filmId}, #{rawUrl}, #{providerType}, #{embedUrl}, #{directUrl}, #{thumbnailUrl}, #{title}, #{durationSeconds}, #{isTrailer}, #{isActive}, #{priority}, NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE film_video_source SET raw_url = #{rawUrl}, provider_type = #{providerType}, embed_url = #{embedUrl}, direct_url = #{directUrl}, thumbnail_url = #{thumbnailUrl}, title = #{title}, duration_seconds = #{durationSeconds}, is_trailer = #{isTrailer}, is_active = #{isActive}, priority = #{priority} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE film_video_source SET is_active = false WHERE id = #{id}
